prompt: Extract all the text from this PDF file: C:\Users\ypyl\OneDrive\Documents\Yauhen_Pyl_CV_0.pdf. Save the extracted text to a file called cv_text.txt in the current directory. Make sure to preserve the layout and formatting.

assertions.name: output_not_empty
assertions.description: Extracted text file is not empty

assertions.name: contains_text_content
assertions.description: Output contains actual text content (not just whitespace)
